<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Cluster\Hash; /** * An hash generator implements the logic used to calculate the hash of a key to * distribute operations among Redis nodes. */ interface HashGeneratorInterface { /** * Generates an hash from a string to be used for distribution. * * @param string $value String value. * * @return int */ public function hash($value); }
